reasons: Khufra directly attacks Gusion's need to dash into the target.
Backline protection is strong because Gusion must enter close range to complete his combo.

proof.summary: Gusion depends on dash access after marking a target; Khufra can guard the target area and punish the dash-in timing.
worksBestWhen: Khufra stays near the hero Gusion wants to burst.
Khufra waits for Gusion's second cast instead of engaging too early.
failureCases: Gusion baits Khufra's anti-dash tool before committing.
Gusion attacks from an unexpected flank where Khufra is not positioned.

reasons: Minsitthar can limit Gusion's dash-based combo in a controlled area.
This is especially useful around objectives where Gusion must enter a predictable zone.

proof.summary: Gusion wants repeated mobility inside a burst combo; Minsitthar can create a zone where dash-based execution becomes much harder.
worksBestWhen: Minsitthar saves the zone for Gusion's real commit.
The protected carry stays inside the anti-dive zone.
failureCases: Gusion waits outside the zone and re-engages after it ends.
Minsitthar misses timing and Gusion finishes the combo first.

reasons: Kaja can lock Gusion after he dives into the backline.
This punishes Gusion's need to stand close enough to recall daggers and finish the kill.

proof.summary: Gusion's burst requires close commitment; Kaja can hold direct lockdown for the moment Gusion enters.
worksBestWhen: Kaja stays close to the likely target.
Allies immediately burst Gusion during the lock.
failureCases: Kaja is forced to control another diver.
Gusion pokes with daggers without fully committing.

reasons: Obsidia can punish Gusion's dash-based combo by restricting his displacement during Hunt of Bone.
This is especially valuable after Gusion commits with Sword Spike or Incandescence, because it limits his ability to reset, chase, or escape after the burst attempt.

proof.summary: Gusion depends on displacement skills to enter, reset, and leave after his dagger combo; Obsidia's Hunt of Bone can tether him and disable displacement skills for a short window, making his combo flow much harder to complete safely.
worksBestWhen: Obsidia has vision of Gusion before he starts the flank.
Obsidia saves Hunt of Bone until Gusion commits or tries to escape after using part of his combo.
Allies are ready to follow up while Gusion is tethered.
failureCases: Obsidia misses Hunt of Bone or hits the wrong frontline target.
Gusion bursts Obsidia before she can cast the ultimate.
Gusion waits outside the tether window and re-engages after it ends.

reasons: Saber can punish Gusion after Gusion dashes in and becomes targetable.
Gusion is vulnerable when his combo reset or escape path is already spent.

proof.summary: Gusion wants to complete a fast combo and leave; Saber can answer when Gusion has committed Incandescence or Sword Spike into the fight.
worksBestWhen: Saber does not reveal before Gusion commits.
Saber targets Gusion after the first dash sequence.
failureCases: Gusion holds his reset and dodges the punish window.
